posts.description:
What makes vinyl floor installation the top choice for Orlando homeowners? The answer comes down to durability, water resistance, and a finish that transforms a room in days, not weeks.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, vinyl installation is one of our most requested services. Our team has completed over 600 flooring projects across Central Florida in nine years, and the process is designed to be seamless from start to finish.

We begin with a free in-home consultation, take precise measurements, remove your old floor, prepare the subfloor, and install your new vinyl with professional-grade tools. A written quote is provided before any work begins, so there are no surprises.

Luxury vinyl plank holds up against Florida humidity, pet traffic, spills, and daily wear. It works in every room, including kitchens and bathrooms.

Financing is available through Synchrony Bank for qualified customers. We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Kissimmee, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Can hardwood floors really last 30 years? With the right installation, proper subfloor preparation, and the correct species or engineered product for Florida's climate, the answer is yes.

Hardwood flooring installation requires precision at every step. At Kadosh Flooring Store, our licensed teams have refined this process across nine years and more than 600 Central Florida homes. We assess moisture levels, acclimate the material, prepare the subfloor to exact tolerances, and install with attention to grain direction, pattern, and expansion gaps.

Engineered hardwood is particularly well-suited for Florida homes because it manages humidity fluctuations better than solid wood while delivering the same premium look and feel.

Our process begins with a free in-home consultation and a written quote before work starts. We also offer a mobile flooring showroom so you can compare wood tones and textures in your own home's lighting.

Flexible financing is available through Synchrony Bank. We serve Greater Orlando, Winter Park, Windermere, Oviedo, Sanford, and surrounding Central Florida communities.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

An outdated bathroom in an Orlando home is one of the fastest things that affects daily comfort, home value, and how guests perceive a property. The good news is that a targeted bathroom remodel can change everything in a matter of days.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, our bathroom remodeling service in Orlando covers tile removal, subfloor work, wall tile installation, floor tile installation, vanity coordination, and complete finishing. We handle projects that range from a single bathroom refresh to full master bath transformations.

Nine years in Central Florida and over 600 completed projects means our team knows how to work efficiently without cutting corners.

Every bathroom remodel starts with a free in-home consultation, a complete written quote, and a clear timeline. You know exactly what to expect before a single tool is picked up.

We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, Windermere, Clermont, and the surrounding Greater Orlando area. Synchrony Bank financing is available for qualified homeowners.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Why do so many Florida homeowners choose vinyl plank flooring over other options? Vinyl plank handles everything Florida throws at it: high humidity, sudden temperature changes, pet accidents, and heavy foot traffic. It does this while looking and feeling like real wood.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, vinyl plank flooring installation is our highest-volume service. In nine years of working across Central Florida, we have installed luxury vinyl plank in more than 600 homes, from starter homes in Kissimmee to lakefront properties in Windermere.

The installation process begins at your home. Our team measures precisely, removes existing flooring when needed, prepares the subfloor, and installs your new vinyl plank with full attention to direction, pattern matching, and transitions.

A written quote is provided before any work starts, and every project includes a free in-home consultation so you see the samples in your actual space under your home's natural light.

We serve Greater Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, and surrounding areas. Financing is available through Synchrony Bank.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

What sets a flooring store in Orlando apart from simply ordering samples online? The ability to bring the showroom to your home.

Kadosh Flooring Store offers a mobile flooring showroom that brings real flooring samples directly to you in Greater Orlando. Instead of guessing how a floor will look in your space, you compare actual materials under your home's natural light, in the room where the floor will be installed.

Our consultants carry vinyl plank, laminate, engineered hardwood, porcelain tile, carpet, and finishing accessories. We help you coordinate floors, baseboards, and trims in one visit.

In nine years and over 600 projects across Central Florida, our clients consistently tell us that the in-home sample experience made the final decision much easier and more confident.

Every quote is provided in writing before any work begins. The consultation is completely free. We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, Windermere, Oviedo, Sanford, Clermont, and Kissimmee.

Call our Orlando office to schedule your mobile showroom visit: (407) 495-2700.

Vinyl plank flooring installation at Kadosh Flooring Store follows a single, coordinated process from the first call to the final pass. No multiple visits. No unclear timelines. One team that handles everything.

We measure your space, source the right material from our showroom inventory, prepare your subfloor, and complete the installation in a way that minimizes disruption to your home. Open-concept kitchens, living areas, hallways, and bedrooms all handled in sequence by the same licensed team.

Nine years and over 600 Central Florida projects have shaped a process that our clients consistently describe as smooth and stress-free. We provide a written quote before any work starts. No surprises.

Vinyl plank is waterproof, scratch-resistant, and available in dozens of widths, tones, and textures that work with any Florida home interior. Our consultants help you select the right product during a free in-home visit.

Financing is available through Synchrony Bank. We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, Kissimmee, Oviedo, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Orlando bathroom remodeling does not require a complete gut renovation to produce dramatic results. With the right tile selection, fixture upgrade, and professional installation, the same footprint can feel like an entirely different space.

Kadosh Flooring Store specializes in bathroom remodeling across Greater Orlando, with a focus on tile work, floor installation, and finishing details that determine how a remodel looks long-term.

Our team handles the full scope: removing old tile and flooring, waterproofing, laying new floor and wall tile, coordinating with plumbing trim-out, and completing with baseboard and trim finishes.

The result is a bathroom that matches the standard of the rest of your home, or raises it.

Every project includes a free in-home consultation and a written quote before a single tile is moved. We have completed over 600 Central Florida projects in nine years. We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Winter Park, Dr. Phillips, Windermere, Clermont, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Florida's humidity is the single biggest concern homeowners raise when considering hardwood flooring installation. The right product and the right installation process make all the difference.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, we recommend engineered hardwood for most Central Florida homes because of how it responds to the state's moisture cycles. Engineered hardwood shares the top veneer of real wood with a multi-ply core that resists expansion and contraction far better than solid wood.

Our installation process starts with a moisture assessment of your subfloor. We acclimate the material to your home's environment before installation begins, and we use correct expansion gaps at every wall to allow for Florida's seasonal humidity changes.

In nine years and over 600 projects across Greater Orlando, we have installed hardwood in coastal properties, lakefront homes, and inland residences with excellent long-term results.

The process starts with a free in-home consultation and a written quote. Financing is available through Synchrony Bank.

We serve Orlando, Winter Park, Windermere, Oviedo, Sanford, Clermont, and all surrounding Central Florida areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Choosing vinyl plank flooring from a photo or a small sample board rarely gives you the full picture. The color looks different in your home's light. The texture feels different underfoot. The undertone works differently against your walls and furniture.

This is exactly why Kadosh Flooring Store brings samples to you.

Our free in-home consultation includes real flooring samples from our showroom, brought directly to your space in Orlando or the surrounding area. You compare luxury vinyl plank options in the room where they will be installed, under your actual lighting, next to your existing walls and cabinetry.

Our design consultants help you evaluate width, texture, gloss level, and color undertone so the final selection is one you can feel confident about before any quote is signed.

We have completed over 600 Central Florida projects in nine years. Our team handles everything from measurement through final installation. A written quote is provided before work begins.

We serve Greater Orlando, Lake Nona, Kissimmee, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, and more.

Florida families put floors through a different kind of test. Kids, pets, frequent guests, outdoor-indoor traffic, and the inevitable spills from high-humidity summers all add up quickly.

Vinyl floor installation at Kadosh Flooring Store is chosen by Orlando families for exactly this reason. Luxury vinyl is 100 percent waterproof at the wear layer level, scratch-resistant with a protective coating, and stable underfoot even in Florida's temperature swings.

Unlike hardwood, vinyl does not warp when humid outdoor air comes in through sliding glass doors. Unlike laminate, vinyl does not swell when a drink is spilled. And unlike tile, vinyl is warm and comfortable underfoot, reducing fatigue during long days in the kitchen or living room.

Our installation process is designed for active homes. We protect your space during the work, complete the project efficiently, and leave your home clean and ready the same day.

Nine years across Central Florida. Over 600 homes served. Written quote before any work starts. Financing through Synchrony Bank available.

We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, Kissimmee, and more.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Among all flooring options, hardwood is the one that homeowners almost never regret. The texture, warmth, and visual weight of wood planks in a room create an atmosphere that no other material fully replicates.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, hardwood flooring installation is treated as a precision project. The choice between solid and engineered hardwood, the direction of the planks, the finish level, and the species or wood tone all contribute to a result that either exceeds or misses expectations.

Our consultants in Orlando help you navigate these decisions before installation begins. We bring samples to your home, assess your subfloor conditions, and recommend the product that will perform best in your specific space.

How does vinyl plank flooring compare to tile, laminate, or hardwood for an Orlando home? Here is what nine years of Central Florida installations has taught us.

Compared to ceramic tile, vinyl plank is warmer underfoot, easier to maintain, and softer for families with young children or elderly members. Compared to laminate, vinyl plank is fully waterproof and holds up in bathrooms and kitchens where laminate often fails. Compared to solid hardwood, vinyl plank handles Florida humidity without warping, cupping, or gapping over time.

Luxury vinyl plank delivers the appearance of real wood planks with a durability profile that genuinely matches how Orlando families use their homes.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, we help Orlando homeowners make this comparison in their own space. Our free in-home consultation includes samples of all major flooring types so you can see and feel the difference side by side.

Nine years. Over 600 Central Florida homes. Written quote before any work begins. Financing available through Synchrony Bank.

We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Kissimmee, Winter Park, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Choosing a new floor from a small sample in a brightly lit store is one of the most common reasons homeowners end up disappointed with the final result. The color reads differently. The texture feels unfamiliar. The tone clashes with walls they forgot to account for.

Kadosh Flooring Store solves this with a mobile flooring showroom that brings real samples to your Orlando home.

Does hardwood flooring actually add value to a home in Orlando? According to real estate professionals across Central Florida, hardwood floors consistently appear on buyer priority lists and reduce time on market.

From an investment perspective, hardwood flooring installation replaces a depreciating surface, such as worn carpet, with one that appreciates in perceived value the longer it is maintained. In rooms like the master bedroom, home office, or main living area, the visual impact is immediate and measurable in how buyers respond to a listing.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, we have completed hardwood flooring installations for homeowners preparing for sale as well as for those planning to stay for years. In both cases, the result is a space that reads as more elevated and more finished than the same room with carpet or outdated tile.

Our team in Orlando handles the full process: removal, subfloor preparation, moisture assessment, installation, and trim. Written quote before work starts. Free in-home consultation included.

Nine years. Over 600 projects. Serving Greater Orlando, Winter Park, Windermere, Oviedo, Sanford, and Clermont.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

For Orlando homeowners with dogs, cats, or both, vinyl floor installation is the most practical upgrade available. Here is why.

Luxury vinyl floors feature a wear layer that resists pet scratches more effectively than hardwood and holds up against claw traction that slowly degrades laminate over time. The surface is fully waterproof, which means pet accidents, water bowl spills, and muddy paws from Florida rain can be cleaned without any damage to the floor beneath.

Vinyl also does not hold pet dander or allergens the way carpet does, which is a meaningful benefit for households with allergy-sensitive family members.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, we help Orlando families choose the right vinyl product for their specific situation. Thickness, wear layer grade, and texture all vary by product line, and our consultants bring samples to your home so you can compare the right options before committing.

Nine years of Central Florida installations. Over 600 homes completed. Written quote before any work starts. Free in-home consultation included.

Financing through Synchrony Bank available. We serve Greater Orlando, Kissimmee, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, small bathroom remodeling in Orlando is one of our most impactful service categories. The design decisions in a tight space matter more than in larger rooms. Tile size, grout color, vanity proportion, and vertical patterns all contribute to how the eye reads the room.

Our team brings this design knowledge to every consultation. We help Orlando homeowners choose the tile, layout, and finish that maximizes visual space within the existing footprint, without structural changes or expanded budgets.

What does vinyl plank flooring installation actually cost in Orlando? The complete answer includes more than the price per square foot of material.

A full vinyl plank installation project typically involves: material cost, removal and disposal of existing flooring, subfloor preparation, underlayment, installation labor, transition strips, baseboard caulking, and final cleanup.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, we provide a complete, itemized written quote before any work begins. There are no additions after the quote is signed. What you see in writing is what you pay.

In nine years of vinyl plank installations across Central Florida, we have seen clients surprised by contractors who quoted only material and labor, then added removal, disposal, and prep as separate items. Our quotes include everything needed to deliver a finished floor.

For homeowners who want to spread the investment over time, financing is available through Synchrony Bank with promotional options for qualified applicants.

The consultation and quote are completely free. We serve Greater Orlando, Lake Nona, Kissimmee, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office to schedule your quote: (407) 495-2700.

Engineered hardwood flooring is the most frequently misunderstood product in Central Florida, and that misunderstanding costs homeowners money.

Here is what engineered hardwood actually is: a real wood veneer bonded to a high-density multi-ply core. The top surface is genuine hardwood, the same species and grain as solid wood. The core is engineered to resist the expansion and contraction that solid wood experiences in Florida's high-humidity environment.

The result is a floor that looks, feels, and refinishes like real hardwood, while performing far more reliably in Florida conditions than solid wood ever would.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, we have installed engineered hardwood in Orlando homes for nine years across more than 600 projects. Our consultants explain the product honestly: what it is, what it is not, what it will look like in ten years, and how it compares to luxury vinyl plank and solid wood for your specific situation.

A free in-home consultation brings samples directly to your space. Written quote before work starts. Financing available through Synchrony Bank.

We serve Greater Orlando, Lake Nona, Windermere, Oviedo, Sanford, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Before you decide on vinyl floor installation in Orlando, here are three questions our clients consistently wish they had asked upfront.

First: what is under your existing floor? Old tile, raised areas, or a damaged subfloor all affect the installation process. At Kadosh Flooring Store, we assess the subfloor condition before finalizing your quote.

Second: which wear layer thickness do you need? Homes with pets, children, or heavy foot traffic benefit from a thicker wear layer. Our consultants will recommend the right grade during your free in-home consultation.

Third: is the installation price truly all-inclusive? Many quotes exclude removal and disposal, subfloor work, and transition strips. Our written quote covers everything before work begins.

These details separate a vinyl floor installation that lasts a decade and looks great from one that frustrates after the first year.

Nine years. Over 600 Central Florida projects. We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Kissimmee, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, and surrounding areas. Financing available through Synchrony Bank.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

The most common mistake in Orlando bathroom remodeling is starting in the wrong order. Choosing tile before finalizing the vanity leads to mismatched tones. Starting demolition before plumbing is confirmed adds cost and delay. Picking a grout color without seeing it in the actual space produces a result that surprises no one pleasantly.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, every bathroom remodel in Orlando begins with a structured consultation that sets the sequence correctly.

We start by understanding the scope: full remodel, tile update only, or complete transformation. We then bring samples to the home so product decisions are made in context. From there, we provide a complete written quote that includes tile, floor, waterproofing, and coordinated trim. Demolition begins only after the quote is approved and materials are ordered.

This sequence is why our clients across Greater Orlando experience bathroom remodels that finish on schedule and match the original vision.

Nine years. Over 600 Central Florida homes served. Free in-home consultation. Written quote before work begins.

We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Windermere, Winter Park, Oviedo, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

What actually happens on hardwood flooring installation day at a Central Florida home? Here is an honest overview of the process, based on nine years of installations across Greater Orlando.

Before the team arrives, your furniture has been moved from the room, or our team handles it as agreed during the consultation. The existing flooring is removed and disposed of responsibly.

The subfloor is inspected, leveled where needed, and moisture-tested before any wood material is acclimated or laid. Hardwood acclimation is a step that matters in Florida, and we take it seriously.

Installation proceeds by section, with careful attention to plank direction, pattern breaks, and expansion gaps at walls. Thresholds and transition strips are installed last. Cleanup follows immediately.

By the end of the day, or within the agreed timeline, your floor is complete and ready for furniture return.

Written quote before the process begins. Free in-home consultation confirms scope, product, and timeline.

We serve Greater Orlando, Winter Park, Oviedo, Sanford, Lake Nona, Windermere, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Orlando homes face a specific combination of challenges that most flooring products are not designed for: year-round humidity, intense UV exposure through large windows and sliding glass doors, active family use, and frequent outdoor-indoor traffic from pools and patios.

Luxury vinyl plank flooring is designed for exactly this. The core construction is dimensionally stable in humidity fluctuations. The wear layer resists scratches from sandy Florida soil tracked inside. The surface is waterproof, which matters in homes where kids and pets move freely between outdoor and indoor spaces.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, our Orlando vinyl plank installations are selected to match your specific conditions. We consider sun exposure, subfloor type, traffic patterns, and room function when recommending the right product from our showroom.

Nine years of experience across Central Florida means our team has seen how each product category performs in real Florida homes over time. That knowledge guides every recommendation we make.

Free in-home consultation. Written quote before work starts. Licensed installation team. Financing through Synchrony Bank available.

Solid hardwood versus engineered hardwood in an Orlando home: which one is the right choice?

After nine years of hardwood flooring installations across Greater Orlando, here is our assessment.

Solid hardwood performs beautifully in climates with low humidity variation. Florida is not that climate. Orlando's combination of high summer humidity and air-conditioned interior air creates significant seasonal moisture fluctuation. Solid hardwood responds to this by expanding and contracting, which leads to gapping, cupping, or board movement over time.

Engineered hardwood shares the same real wood surface as solid hardwood but is built on a multi-ply core that remains dimensionally stable in Florida's conditions. The result is a floor that looks and feels identical to solid wood but performs far more reliably in Central Florida homes.

For most Orlando homeowners, engineered hardwood is the correct answer. For specific applications with very stable climate environments, solid hardwood remains a valid option, and our consultants will advise you honestly on which fits your situation.

Free in-home consultation. Written quote before work begins. Financing through Synchrony Bank.

We serve Greater Orlando, Winter Park, Windermere, Sanford, Oviedo, Lake Nona, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.

Vinyl floor installation done right means more than laying material on a subfloor. It means a level, stable result that stays flat after the first Florida summer. Seams that do not click or lift after six months. Transitions that are tight and finished. Baseboards that are caulked and painted to match.

At Kadosh Flooring Store, this is the standard we hold every vinyl floor installation to across Greater Orlando.

In nine years of Central Florida flooring work, we have seen what happens when subfloor prep is skipped, when materials are not acclimated, and when expansion gaps are ignored. The floor fails. We have also seen the opposite: clients with vinyl floors we installed five and six years ago that still look new because the foundation was built correctly.

Our written quote covers the complete scope before any work begins. Our licensed team handles the installation from removal through final trim work. Our free in-home consultation ensures you are selecting the right product for your specific space.

Financing available through Synchrony Bank. We serve Orlando, Lake Nona, Dr. Phillips, Kissimmee, Winter Park, Windermere, Oviedo, Sanford, Clermont, and surrounding areas.

Call our Orlando office: (407) 495-2700.
